productDisplayName: Lee Men's Sahara Storm Rider T-shirt
description: The lee Storm Rider t-shirt is a classy pick from the lee apparel range. With a haunting, lone cowboy and his shadow there on this t-shirt, you are always in your own company. This lee t-shirt is designed with a special high strength yarn, which gives it a subtle sheen and perfect drape. Made with anti-crease modal-cotton blend fabric, this Storm rider t-shirt is ideal for long road trips and travels.    Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
